zh.Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara,: 義大利馬薩 E 卡拉拉利其亞納 納迪瓦藍諾
義大利馬安科納法布利亞諾瓦藍諾
zh.lifeSummary: Umberto della Volta是Marchione della Volta的兒子，於大約1144年出生在義大利馬安科納法布利亞諾瓦藍諾。他和Simonetta至少有1個兒子。

意大利馬安科納法布利亞諾瓦藍諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Umberto della Volta是Marchione della Volta的儿子，于大约1144年出生在意大利馬安科納法布利亞諾瓦藍諾。他和Simonetta至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Carmine, Geno, Amelio, Aniello, Concetta, Cosmo, Flavio, Gaetano, Gennaro, Mafalda, Raffaele.
Italian: habitational name from any of numerous minor places called Cella or Celle (from cella ‘cell’), because they were once the locations of hermits’ cells.

nameMeanings.name: Volta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called with the word volta ‘turn’, ‘vault’.
from a shortened form of a medieval personal name such as Bonavolta, literally ‘good fortune’, or Malavolta ‘bad fortune’.

nameMeanings.name: Umberto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: See Humbert . The former Italian royal family is descended from the Blessed Umberto of Savoy ( 1136–88 ).

en.lifeSummary: Umberto della Volta was born about 1144, in Varano, Fabriano, Ancona, Marche, Italy as the son of Marchione della Volta. He had at least 1 son with Simonetta.

ko.lifeSummary: Umberto della Volta(은)는 대략 1144년 이탈리아 마체 앤코나 파브리아노 바랜오에서 Marchione della Volta의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Simonetta(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
